task_completion.description: Create a new tiddler named 'Acquisitions Dashboard'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a tiddler titled 'Acquisitions Dashboard' open in the TiddlyWiki interface, either in view or edit mode.

task_completion.description: Program the dashboard with bulk-update logic
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the edit view of the 'Acquisitions Dashboard' tiddler. The text area must contain TiddlyWiki widget code (e.g., <$button>, <$list>, <$action-setfield>, <$action-listops>) that targets tiddlers with the 'AcquisitionQueue' tag, removes that tag, adds the 'MainCollection' tag, and sets the 'catalog-status' field to 'Complete'.

task_completion.description: Include a 'Process Batch' button in the dashboard
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a rendered clickable button labeled 'Process Batch' visible inside the saved 'Acquisitions Dashboard' tiddler.

task_completion.description: Execute the bulk-update by clicking the button
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the agent's cursor clicking the 'Process Batch' button, or the immediate UI state change indicating the button was pressed.

task_completion.description: Verify the books' tags were updated successfully
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at any book tiddler, tag pill, or search/filter results shown after the button click. The 'AcquisitionQueue' tag should no longer be present on the books, and they should now display the 'MainCollection' tag.

task_completion.description: Verify the books' catalog-status field was updated successfully
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the fields section of any updated book tiddler shown in the screenshots. The 'catalog-status' field should be visible and set to 'Complete'.

integrity.description: The agent must not manually edit the individual book tiddlers
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no screenshots showing the agent opening individual book tiddlers in edit mode to manually type in the new tags or status fields.

integrity.description: The agent must use the TiddlyWiki web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be seen interacting with the TiddlyWiki UI in a web browser to create the dashboard, rather than using terminal commands or a text editor to modify the backend .tid files directly.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely interacted with the application
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a natural progression of UI states: opening the 'New Tiddler' draft, typing the code, saving the tiddler, and clicking the rendered button.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target tiddler name: 'Acquisitions Dashboard'. Target book count: 30. Initial tag to target and remove: 'AcquisitionQueue'. Final tag to add: 'MainCollection'. Final status field to update: 'catalog-status' set to 'Complete'.
